news.headline: Chinese boy, 7, ends up in ICU with severe abdominal pain after drinking iced beverages
news.summary:
The case of a seven-year-old Chinese boy who had to be sent to an intensive care unit (ICU) after drinking two iced drinks has triggered a heated online discussion.
The boy from central China’s Henan province was admitted to the First Affiliated Hospital of Zhengzhou University recently.

news.headline: Japan Is Running Out of Royals. Are More Men the Answer?
news.summary: Japan’s legislature is drafting a plan to allow the imperial family to adopt distant male relatives. But some in Japan would prefer a female emperor.

news.headline: Baby bonus to continue? We’ll consult widely, John Lee says
news.summary:
The Hong Kong government will conduct a consultation on its slew of pro-baby incentives amid persistently low birth rates, Chief Executive John Lee Ka-chiu has said, noting that delayed marriage and cultural shifts are limiting the effectiveness of such policies.
